fields.name: Statement Template Name
fields.tooltip:
Contains the name of the VAT statement template.
The statement name is the name you gave the VAT statement template in the Name field of the VAT Statement Templates window.

fields.name: Statement Name
fields.tooltip:
Contains the name for the VAT statement.
The statement name is the name you gave the VAT statement in the Name field in the VAT Statement Names window.
The program completes this field automatically.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Displays the line number for the VAT statement line.
When you set up a VAT statement line, the program automatically enters a unique identifying line number in the Line No. field.

fields.name: Row No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number that identifies the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the VAT statement line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what the VAT statement line will include.

fields.name: Account Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies an account interval or a series of account numbers.

fields.name: Gen. Posting Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Row Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies a row-number interval or a series of row numbers.

fields.name: Amount Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the VAT statement line shows the VAT amounts or the base amounts on which the VAT is calculated.

fields.name: Calculate with
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether amounts on the VAT statement will be calculated with their original sign or with the sign reversed.

fields.name: Print
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the VAT statement line will be printed on the report that contains the finished VAT statement.

fields.name: Print with
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether amounts on the VAT statement will be printed with their original sign or with the sign reversed.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
You cannot fill in this field when you define the VAT statement, but you can use the field to put a filter on when you print reports. If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: New Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a new page should begin immediately after this line when the VAT statement is printed. To start a new page after this line, place a check mark in the field.

fields.name: Tax Jurisdiction Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a tax jurisdiction code for the statement.

fields.name: Use Tax
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to use only entries from the VAT Entry table that are marked as Use Tax to be totaled on this line.

fields.name: Box No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number on the box that the VAT statement applies to.
